title: Money for Speed
writer: Vera Allinson, Monica Ewer, Lionel Hale
actors: John Loder, Ida Lupino, Cyril McLaglen
plot: Motorcycle speedway champion Big Bill Summers (Cyril McLaglen) has amorous intentions towards attractive young Jane (Ida Lupino). After Bill's rival on the dirt tracks, Mitch (John Loder), also becomes his rival for Jane's attenti...
